_comment: Outstanding work from the Part D audit, in Jira work-manifest shape so jira/sync.py can pick it up. Each entry has the same shape as items in jira/work-manifest.yaml: extId (stable slug), title, context (one-paragraph rationale), status. Priority hints follow the existing CAT/Tier convention.

items.title: Add explicit /driver/verification/idv route + affiliation-gate banner
items.context: Backend already stores per-user idvStatus and Settings has an ID Verification tab. The driver-side dedicated /verification/idv route called out in the test plan is not yet a discrete page. Add one, plus an 'Awaiting affiliation' banner on /driver when fleet membership is empty so the gate is visible without opening the tour.

items.title: Render 'Awaiting affiliation' banner on DriverDashboard when no fleet links
items.context: When a driver has completed IDV but is not yet affiliated with any carrier/OO, the dashboard shows live-offer scaffolding with zero offers and no explanation. Add a persistent banner explaining the affiliation gate and a CTA to share their driver-id with a dispatcher.

items.title: Author E2E (HE2E + VE2E) suites for the five personas
items.context: Plan exists at docs/testing/e2e-uat-bdd-test-plan.md; no tests/e2e/ directory present. Stand up Playwright + write the 5 critical paths: carrier verification + driver onboarding + dispatch; OO self-haul; driver accept + status + POD; shipper post + track; receiver confirm-delivery.

items.title: Author SEC system tests
items.context: Plan covers SEC system tests (security boundary, auth, RBAC) not yet implemented. After E2E baseline is in place, layer SEC tests on top covering CARRIER_ADMIN -> 403 on /api/admin/*, IDV-required gating, and verified-org gating.

items.title: Author REL (reliability) system tests
items.context: Plan covers REL: broadcast under load, offer-expiry race, status idempotency, POD upload retry. Author after E2E baseline.

items.title: Author UAT + BDD suites
items.context: Plan covers UAT (acceptance) and BDD (gherkin) flows. Author after E2E + SEC + REL baselines are stable.

items.title: Author H series unit tests (cross-persona contracts)
items.context: Test spec includes H1-H4 covering cross-persona contracts (shipper -> driver matching, carrier -> driver assignment, OO self-haul, receiver -> POD chain). No tests matching H1/H2/H3/H4 names exist today.

items.title: Verify compliance CI is green for OpenSCAP/Prowler/Semgrep/gitleaks
items.context: Workflow .github/workflows/compliance.yml has the 6 jobs configured, but pass/fail status on the latest run on main has not been confirmed in this audit. Run: gh run list --workflow=compliance.yml -L 5; investigate any red jobs.

items.title: Document per-LL-control DONE/PARTIAL status in stig-checklist.md
items.context: compliance/llmap.yaml lists every LL-* control and the normalize/merge tooling exists. The actual per-control implementation status across the codebase has not been catalogued. Walk the list and tag each as DONE/PARTIAL/NOT STARTED with evidence.

items.title: Verify dashboard 'Coming soon' tiles obey no-fabrication rule
items.context: Spec requires NULL / 'Coming soon' / 'Connect <X>' rather than fabricated zeros for unconnected integrations (ELD, reefer telemetry, fuel cards, FMCSA SMS). Inspect every dashboard tile and confirm fabricated values are absent.

items.title: Provision PostGIS analytics replica + author initial schema
items.context: Analytics DB spec (docs/database-analytics/analytics-db-spec.md) describes a PostGIS read-replica fed by DynamoDB Streams. Nothing has been provisioned. Provision the RDS instance, run the schema DDL, and document credentials in CREDENTIALS.md.

items.title: Build DynamoDB-Streams -> PostGIS Lambda consumer
items.context: Once the PostGIS schema exists, build the Lambda that consumes DynamoDB Streams, transforms records, and writes to PostGIS. Provisioning checklist in docs/database-analytics/analytics-db-provisioning.md.

items.title: Author analytics read models + materialized views
items.context: After the Streams consumer is writing, layer read models and refresh-able materialized views per the build-now tier of the spec. Defer 'gated' tier items (ELD/reefer/fuel/CSA telemetry).

items.title: Merge feat/admin-bootstrap-lockdown to main + deploy
items.context: Branch ready and tested. Removes the CAT-I public admin bootstrap form, env-gates the route, adds atomic singleton + rate limit + audit log, plus persona-card cleanup. Merge to main, deploy frontend + backend.
